Short Description: INFOR: Issues on routes 0267R2611 and 5076R2611
Description:
Two sales orders (5926265201 and 5926273701) were recorded but for some reason we didn't understand yet they were allocated into route 0.
The orders are crossdocking so, the allocate into the route 7062R2611 didn't go through that's the reason we have those orders in route 0.
Process:
- DC Azambuja (route 7062R2611) -> DC Porto (route 0267R2611) - > McD Rio Tinto 
- DC Azambuja (route 7062R2611) -> DC Porto (route 5076R2611) - > McD Matosinhos
What we had was:
- Route 0 -> DC Porto > Final Customer.
The picking wasn't performed. When DC Porto try to send the route received the following error message:
To correct that, a new route was created to connect the orders and close them to unblock the routes in DC Porto.
But the close order process was done prior to the change of route arrived as well as the start load wasn't performed.
So, we have a failure in integration. Until that is solved, we can't perform the load and invoice them.
The issue happens in DC Porto, but because it's crossdocking it needs to be solved in DC Azambuja too.m

Short Description: HAVIConnect – Order proposal corrections not transferred into final order (multiple items)
Description:
Country: Germany Department: 
Customer Service Application: 
HAVIConnect User: Mike Hutzel Customer / 
Restaurant: DE MCD #1784 
Business: MCD 

Hello Team, the restaurant DE MCD #1784 reports that manually corrected order proposal quantities in HAVIConnect were not transferred into the final order. As a result, the restaurant received incorrect quantities, leading to an expected claim for an expensive credit note. 

Details: Delivery date: 02.03.2026 
Issue description: The restaurant adjusted several item quantities in the HAVIConnect order proposal (ILOS-based). 
Despite these corrections being visible in the proposal, the final generated order reverted to the original suggested quantities, ignoring the user's changes. 

Examples reported by the restaurant: 
Item 1809‑123 – Apfelschorle Proposal suggested 16 VE, user changed to 4 VE (image01) Final order shows 16 VE again (correction not saved) (image02) 
Item 3309‑387 – Stilles Wasser Proposal showed 4 VE, user changed to 0 VE (image03) Final order contains 4 VE, not the corrected 0 VE (image04) 

Additional items with the same issue: 
#000003‑604 – Bun BM Best Burger 
#000001‑890 – Bun HB #001197‑106 – Bacon ganze Streifen QS / ITW 
#003191‑117 – Orangensaft Tropicana 48x0,25l 
#002887‑051 – Dip Sourcream mit Schnittlauch 
#007919‑149 – Sauce Big Tasty 
#000055‑342 – Sauce BM 

Because of this system behavior, the restaurant received goods it did not order. Please investigate why the corrected proposal quantities were not transferred to the corresponding final order.
